_meta.source: Fournier & Andrieu 2000, Ann Bot 86:551-563, Fig 12 panels A and B
_meta.precision_note: Vision extraction from printed figure with overlapping markers and CI bars; ±10% global. Tighten to ±2% via WebPlotDigitizer on a high-res rescan if needed.
_meta.precision_at_phyt9_peak_note: Birch 2002 line 173 reports Déa phyt-9 Phase III rate = 0.38 cm/°Cd, exactly matching the vision-extracted value. Independent paper, independent fit, exact match → at least the peak rank has ~0% error. Other ranks remain at ±10% pending per-rank Birch cross-check (Layer D.2 minor follow-up).
_meta.secondary_dataset_reason: direct X-ray ground truth where overlap exists; 1A-1B systematic difference (~5%) records inter-method uncertainty
_meta.phyt_rank_convention: acropetal, rank 1 = first true leaf (cotyledon excluded)

v_n_cm_per_degCd._description: Phase III linear elongation rate per phytomer rank, in cm·°Cd⁻¹ (absolute, not relative-to-final-length)
v_n_cm_per_degCd._systematic_offset: expt_1B values are 5-10% higher than expt_1A at every overlapping rank; treat as methodological systematic uncertainty

D_n_degCd._description: Phase III duration per phytomer rank, in °Cd. Combined estimate from both experiments (figure shows joint regression with CI bars).
D_n_degCd._phyt_16_17_note: Ranks 16-17 not shown in Fig 12B; populated 2026-04-23 (S5.3) via linear extrapolation of 13->15 slope (~14.5 °Cd/rank). Removes silent fallback to rank-15 value in smoke/adapter code.
D_n_degCd._prose_quote: FA2000 line 233: 'D_n was almost constant for phytomers 6 to 10 and then increased with leaf insertion'

IL_final_cross_check_cm._description: Per-rank IL_final from F-A 2000 Fig 13 (right axis), used to validate v_n × D_n + 4.5 + phase_IV ≈ IL_final

constants_inherited._source_notes: All from FA2000; see PLAN_FOURNIER_ANDRIEU_INTERNODE_KINETICS_2026-04-23.md source attribution table
